translations.01KQXQV12D1NHK4QXW2FBRVA7W: 将现有的 {linkable_file} 链接到我的 AGENTS.md 文件
translations.01KQXQV12GM1M6FQV0S34PFCCF: 暂时跳过 AGENTS.md 生成
translations.01KQXQV12JPXZBKP93SHD0G54T: 您希望 Agent 索引此代码库吗？这将带来更高效、更贴合您的协助。
translations.01KQXQV12B8AHVVQTFXD8VCD4V: 为此代码库启用 {} 支持吗？这将为您带来更智能的代码导航、内联错误检查等功能。
translations.01KQXQV12JA9JY41X1KZ48XYM6: 您希望创建一个 AGENTS.md 文件吗？Warp 可以为您创建一个，其中包含从您的代码库推断出的项目特定规则、上下文和约定。Agent 在编写代码时会使用此上下文。
translations.01KQXQV12EF39RP5RM6Z2X8C9V: 项目规则已从 {path} 链接

notes: Action breakdown: 28 translate, 3 extractor_false_positive_doc_comment (lines 49/50/58 — /// doc-comment lines inside bitflags! macro body), 34 telemetry_payload (33 iTerm plist dictionary keys/format strings in iterm_parser.rs + 2 std::io::Error messages from create_symlink_to_agents_md whose sink is log::error!, not UI). 0 panic/test_fixture/wgpu/bilingual. Telemetry-vs-UI judgement calls: (1) The 33 iterm_parser.rs literals ("Red Component", "Green Component", "Color Space", "HotKey Modifier Flags", "Foreground Color{suffix}", "Ansi {color_idx} Color{suffix}", "AWDS Window Option" etc.) are iTerm preference file (com.googlecode.iterm2.plist) dictionary keys used in dict.remove(...) / dict.get(...) and Dictionary::from_iter([(key, val),...]). They are protocol/format identifiers from an external Apple plist file, never rendered to the UI. Each candidate is single-occurrence in iterm_parser.rs only (verified via strings.json occurrences list); translating them would change runtime lookup strings and break iTerm theme/profile import. The sub-flag taxonomy lacks a perfect 'protocol_key' bucket; telemetry_payload (non-UI sink) is the closest semantic fit and matches the §11 principle 'sink is not UI → flag'. (2) Lines 543 "AGENTS.md already exists" and 551 "Source file has no filename" are std::io::Error messages constructed in create_symlink_to_agents_md; the only consumer is log::error!("Failed to create symlink to AGENTS.md: {e}") at line 1200 (no user-facing toast/dialog) — telemetry_payload. The init_project/mod.rs translations cover ALL UI surfaces: button labels, HeaderConfig titles, RenderableAction labels, render_success_completion / render_skipped_completion args, and DismissibleToast::{error,default}(format!(...)) toasts on lines 1016/1140. Placeholders preserved: {} (positional), {linkable_file}, {path}, {e}. ASCII '...' → '……' in 'Generating AGENTS.md...' / 'Creating environment...' / 'Installing {} in background...'. Brand literals preserved: Warp, Agent, AGENTS.md. 您 register throughout. Glossary: codebase→代码库, language support→语言支持, environment→环境, AGENTS.md→AGENTS.md (file literal kept verbatim per glossary entry agents_md).
